Hindi Maps

indlan <- read_csv('india language.csv')
Parsed with column specification:
cols(
  Table_name = col_character(),
  State_code = col_character(),
  District_code = col_character(),
  `Sub-_district` = col_character(),
  `Area name_` = col_character(),
  Mother_tongue = col_character(),
  `Mother tongue name_` = col_character(),
  Total_P = col_integer(),
  Total_M = col_integer(),
  Total_F = col_integer(),
  Rural_P = col_integer(),
  Rural_M = col_integer(),
  Rural_F = col_integer(),
  Urban_P = col_integer(),
  Urban_M = col_integer(),
  Urban_F = col_integer()
)
names(indlan) <- names(lan1)
indlan$Major <- grepl('\\d+', indlan$language) & !grepl('Others', indlan$language)
indlan %>% filter(Area=="INDIA") %>% filter(Major) %>% arrange(-Total_P) %>% mutate(Share=Total_P/sum(Total_P)) %>% select(language, Total_P, Share) 
# A tibble: 122 x 3
   language       Total_P  Share
   <chr>            <int>  <dbl>
 1 6 HINDI      528347193 0.436 
 2 2 BENGALI     97237669 0.0803
 3 13 MARATHI    83026680 0.0686
 4 21 TELUGU     81127740 0.0670
 5 20 TAMIL      69026881 0.0570
 6 5 GUJARATI    55492554 0.0458
 7 22 URDU       50772631 0.0419
 8 7 KANNADA     43706512 0.0361
 9 15 ODIA       37521324 0.0310
10 11 MALAYALAM  34838819 0.0288
# ... with 112 more rows
indlan %>% filter(Area=="INDIA") %>% filter(!Major) %>% arrange(-Total_P) %>% mutate(Share=Total_P/sum(Total_P)) %>% select(language, Total_P, Share) 
# A tibble: 355 x 3
   language    Total_P  Share
   <chr>         <int>  <dbl>
 1 Hindi     322230097 0.267 
 2 Bengali    96177835 0.0796
 3 Marathi    82801140 0.0685
 4 Telugu     80912459 0.0669
 5 Tamil      68888839 0.0570
 6 Gujarati   55036204 0.0455
 7 Urdu       50725762 0.0420
 8 Bhojpuri   50579447 0.0418
 9 Kannada    43506272 0.0360
10 Malayalam  34776533 0.0288
# ... with 345 more rows
indlan %>% 
  filter(Area=="INDIA" & !Major & substr(Mother_tongue, 1,3)=='006') %>% 
  arrange(-Total_P) %>% 
  mutate(Share=Total_P/sum(Total_P)) %>% 
  select(language, Total_P, Share) %>% 
  filter(!grepl('Others', language) ) %>% 
  left_join(
    indlan %>% 
      filter(!Major & substr(Mother_tongue,1,3)=='006' & Area != "INDIA") %>% 
      group_by(language) %>% 
      mutate(Share=Total_P/sum(Total_P), Total=sum(Total_P)) %>% 
      ungroup() %>% 
      arrange(language, -Share) %>% 
      distinct(language, .keep_all=T) %>% 
      arrange(-Total) %>% 
      filter(!grepl('Others', language)) %>% 
      select(language, MajorState=Area, PercSpeakers=Share) ,
    by='language'
  ) %>%
  arrange(-Total_P) %>% 
  group_by(language)
# Percentage of each dialect by district
distShare <- langMinor %>% filter(substr(Mother_tongue, 1,3)=='006' & District_code != '000' & SubDistrict=='00000') %>% ungroup() %>% mutate(District_code=as.integer(District_code)) %>% group_by(State_code, District_code) %>% mutate(Share=Total_P/sum(Total_P)) %>% arrange(District_code, -Share) %>% select(State_code, District_code, Area, language, Share)
# Top Dialects by state 
stateTop <- indlan %>% filter(!Major & substr(Mother_tongue,1,3)=='006' & Area != "INDIA") %>% group_by(Area) %>% filter(!grepl('Others', language)) %>% mutate(DialectShare=Total_P/sum(Total_P), DialectRank=rank(-Total_P), TotalPop=sum(Total_P)) %>% select(State_code, Area, language, DialectRank, DialectShare, TotalPop) %>% arrange(-TotalPop, DialectRank)
head(distShare)
head(stateTop)
stateTop <- stateTop %>% filter(language != "Hindi" & DialectRank <= 5 & DialectShare > 0.05)
i <- 1
for(i in 1:nrow(stateTop)) {
  stdf <- tibble(District_code=indist[indist$ST_NM==stateTop$Area[i],]$censuscode) %>%
    mutate(index=1:n(), language=stateTop$language[i], State_code=stateTop$State_code[i]) %>% 
    left_join(distShare, by=c('State_code', 'language', 'District_code')) %>%
    replace(., is.na(.), 0) %>%
    arrange(index) %>%
    mutate(Colour=gray(1-Share))
  plot(indist[indist$ST_NM==stateTop$Area[i],], col=stdf$Colour)
  title(paste(stateTop$language[i], ' in ', stateTop$Area[i],sep=''))
}
indlan %>% filter(!Major & substr(Mother_tongue,1,3)=='006' & Area != "INDIA") %>% group_by(language) %>% mutate(Share=Total_P/sum(Total_P), Total=sum(Total_P)) %>% ungroup() %>% arrange(language, -Share) %>% distinct(language, .keep_all=T) %>% arrange(-Total) %>% filter(!grepl('Others', language)) %>% select(language, MajorState=Area, PercSpeakers=Share) 
statetop3 <- indlan %>% filter(!Major & substr(Mother_tongue,1,3)=='006' & Area != "INDIA") %>% group_by(Area) %>% filter(!grepl('Others', language)) %>% mutate(DialectShare=Total_P/sum(Total_P), DialectRank=rank(-Total_P)) %>% group_by(Area) %>% mutate(StateTotal=sum(Total_P))  %>% ungroup() %>% group_by(State_code, Area) %>% top_n(3, Total_P) %>% arrange(Area, DialectRank) %>% select(Area, language, Total_P, DialectShare, DialectRank, StateTotal) %>% mutate(langSig=paste(language,', ', round(DialectShare*100), '%',sep='') ) %>%  select(State_code, Area,StateTotal,DialectRank,langSig) %>% spread(DialectRank, langSig) %>% arrange(-StateTotal)
Adding missing grouping variables: `State_code`
statetop3
topdist <- langMinor %>% filter(substr(Mother_tongue, 1,3)=='006' & District_code != '000' & SubDistrict=='00000') %>% filter(!grepl('Others', language)) %>% group_by(State_code, District_code) %>% mutate(Share=Total_P/sum(Total_P)) %>% arrange(District_code, -Share) %>% distinct(District_code, .keep_all=T)
head(topdist)
require(maptools)
Loading required package: maptools
Loading required package: sp
Checking rgeos availability: FALSE
    Note: when rgeos is not available, polygon geometry     computations in maptools depend on gpclib,
    which has a restricted licence. It is disabled by default;
    to enable gpclib, type gpclibPermit()
indist <- readShapeSpatial('maps/2011_Dist.shp')
use rgdal::readOGR or sf::st_readuse rgdal::readOGR or sf::st_read
names(indist)
[1] "DISTRICT"   "ST_NM"      "ST_CEN_CD"  "DT_CEN_CD"  "censuscode"
indist$ST_NM <- toupper(indist$ST_NM)
unique(indist$ST_NM)

[34] "ANDAMAN & NICOBAR ISLAND" "LAKSHADWEEP"             
indist@data$id <- rownames(indist@data)
indist2 <- fortify(indist, region='id')
indist2 <- indist2 %>% left_join(indist@data)
Joining, by = "id"

#pdf('~/Documents/work/Mint/Top dialects by district.pdf', 16,9)
for(i in 1:6)
{
  stnm <- statetop3$Area[i]
  print(stnm)
  dt <- indist2 %>% 
    left_join(
      topdist %>% 
        ungroup() %>%
        mutate(censuscode=as.numeric(District_code)) %>% 
        select(censuscode, language),
      by='censuscode'
    ) %>%
    filter(ST_NM==stnm)
  if(length(unique(dt$language))>1)
  {
    p <- dt %>%
      ggplot(aes(x=long, y=lat, group=group, fill=language)) +
      geom_polygon() +
      geom_path(lty=3) + 
      coord_equal() + 
      scale_fill_brewer(palette='Set3') + 
      theme_bw() + 
      scale_x_continuous('', breaks=c()) +
      scale_y_continuous('', breaks=c()) +
      ggtitle(stnm)
    print(p)
  }
}
[1] "UTTAR PRADESH"
[1] "BIHAR"
[1] "MADHYA PRADESH"
[1] "RAJASTHAN"
[1] "HARYANA"
[1] "CHHATTISGARH"

#dev.off()
indist2 %>% 
    left_join(
      topdist %>% 
        ungroup() %>%
        mutate(censuscode=as.numeric(District_code)) %>% 
        select(censuscode, language),
      by='censuscode'
    ) %>%
    filter(ST_NM %in% statetop3$Area[1:6]) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=long, y=lat, group=group, fill=language)) +
    geom_polygon() +
    geom_path(lty=3) + 
    coord_equal() + 
    scale_fill_brewer(palette='Set3') + 
    theme_bw() + 
    scale_x_continuous('', breaks=c()) +
    scale_y_continuous('', breaks=c()) +
    facet_wrap(~ST_NM, scales='free')

topHindiStates <- indlan %>% 
  filter(Area!='INDIA' & Major & grepl("HINDI", language)) %>%
  arrange(-Total_P)
head(topHindiStates)
# A tibble: 6 x 17
  Table State_code District_code SubDistrict Area     Mother_tongue language Total_P Total_M
  <chr> <chr>      <chr>         <chr>       <chr>    <chr>         <chr>      <int>   <int>
1 C0116 09         000           00000       UTTAR P… 006000        6 HINDI   1.88e8  9.83e7
2 C0116 10         000           00000       BIHAR    006000        6 HINDI   8.07e7  4.21e7
3 C0116 23         000           00000       MADHYA … 006000        6 HINDI   6.43e7  3.34e7
4 C0116 08         000           00000       RAJASTH… 006000        6 HINDI   6.13e7  3.18e7
5 C0116 06         000           00000       HARYANA  006000        6 HINDI   2.23e7  1.19e7
6 C0116 22         000           00000       CHHATTI… 006000        6 HINDI   2.14e7  1.08e7
# ... with 8 more variables: Total_F <int>, Rural_P <int>, Rural_M <int>, Rural_F <int>,
#   Urban_P <int>, Urban_M <int>, Urban_F <int>, Major <lgl>
dt <- indist2 %>% 
  distinct(DISTRICT, ST_NM, censuscode) %>%
    left_join(
      langMinor %>% 
        filter(substr(Mother_tongue, 1, 3)=='006') %>%  # hindi dialects
        ungroup() %>%
        mutate(censuscode=as.numeric(District_code)) %>% 
        select(censuscode, language, Total_P),
      by='censuscode'
    ) %>% 
  group_by(ST_NM, language) %>%
  filter(!grepl('Others', language)) %>%
  summarise(TotalSpeakers=sum(Total_P)) %>%
  group_by(ST_NM) %>% 
  top_n(n = 4, wt = TotalSpeakers) %>% 
  arrange(ST_NM,-TotalSpeakers)
dt
head(indist2)
      long      lat order  hole piece id group DISTRICT          ST_NM ST_CEN_CD DT_CEN_CD

langMinor %>%
    mutate(censuscode=as.numeric(District_code)) %>% 
    filter(censuscode %in% (
      indist2 %>% 
        filter(ST_NM==stnm) %>% 
        pull(censuscode)
    )) %>%
    group_by(censuscode) %>%
    mutate(Share=Total_P/sum(Total_P), ST_NM=stnm) %>%
    inner_join(dt %>% select(ST_NM, language)) %>%
    select(censuscode, language, Share) %>% 
    inner_join(indist2, by='censuscode') %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=long, y=lat, group=group, fill=Share)) + 
    geom_polygon() + 
    geom_path(lty=3) +
    coord_equal() + 
    facet_wrap(~langauge) +
    scale_fill_gradient(low='white', high='red')

Joining, by = c("language", "ST_NM")
Error in combine_vars(data, params$plot_env, vars, drop = params$drop) : 
  At least one layer must contain all variables used for facetting

head(langMinor)

  Table State_code District_code SubDistrict Area    Mother_tongue language  Total_P Total_M
  <chr> <chr>      <chr>         <chr>       <chr>   <chr>         <chr>       <dbl>   <dbl>
1 C0116 01         000           00000       JAMMU … 001002        Assamese     7842    7398
2 C0116 01         000           00000       JAMMU … 001999        1 Others      498     483
3 C0116 01         000           00000       JAMMU … 002007        Bengali     19811   15228
4 C0116 01         000           00000       JAMMU … 002011        Chakma         12      10
5 C0116 01         000           00000       JAMMU … 002015        Haijong/…       4       4

# ... with 9 more variables: Total_F <dbl>, Rural_P <dbl>, Rural_M <dbl>, Rural_F <dbl>,
#   Urban_P <dbl>, Urban_M <dbl>, Urban_F <dbl>, Major <lgl>, Signature <chr>
hyperlocal <- langMinor %>% filter(SubDistrict=='00000' & District_code != '000' & substr(Mother_tongue, 1, 3)=='006' & !grepl('Others', language)) %>% arrange(language, -Total_P) %>% group_by(language) %>% mutate(DistShare=Total_P/sum(Total_P), DistNum=rank(-Total_P), DistCumShare=cumsum(DistShare), TotalSpeakers=sum(Total_P)) %>% select(language, Area, DistShare, DistNum, DistCumShare, TotalSpeakers) %>% filter((DistCumShare-DistShare) < 0.9) %>%  mutate(Areas=paste(Area, collapse=', ')) %>% filter(DistCumShare>0.9 & (DistCumShare-DistShare)<0.9) %>% arrange(DistNum, -DistCumShare) %>% filter(TotalSpeakers>=1000000) %>% select(language, TotalSpeakers, DistNum, DistCumShare, Areas) %>% filter(DistNum <= 5) %>% pull(language)
indlan %>% 
  filter(language %in% hyperlocal) %>% 
  filter(Area!='INDIA') %>%
  arrange(language, -Total_P) %>% 
  group_by(language) %>% 
  mutate(StateNum=rank(-Total_P)) %>%
  mutate(Share=Total_P/sum(Total_P)) %>%
  filter(StateNum<=2) %>% 
  select(language, Area, Share) %>%
  filter(Share > 0.1)
langMinor %>% filter(SubDistrict!='00000'& substr(Mother_tongue, 1, 3)=='006' & !grepl('Others', language)) %>% arrange(language, -Total_P) %>% group_by(language) %>% mutate(DistShare=Total_P/sum(Total_P), DistNum=rank(-Total_P), DistCumShare=cumsum(DistShare), TotalSpeakers=sum(Total_P)) %>% select(language, Area, DistShare, DistNum, DistCumShare, TotalSpeakers) %>% filter((DistCumShare-DistShare) < 0.9) %>%  mutate(Areas=paste(Area, collapse=', ')) %>% filter(DistCumShare>0.9 & (DistCumShare-DistShare)<0.9) %>% arrange(DistNum, -DistCumShare) %>% filter(TotalSpeakers>=1000000) %>% select(language, Areas, DistNum, DistCumShare)
